The '''''Dukedoom''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] that was present in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. One of twenty-two ships provided to the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance]] Fleet by the Virgillian Free Alignment, it appeared to suffer some troubles to its hyperdrive upon arriving at Sullust.

{{Ship-stub}}
